scenario_edges.scenario: Two front-desk operators check in the same reservation at the same time from different kiosks.
scenario_edges.trigger: concurrent access to one entity with no lock
scenario_edges.impact: double check-in / room double-assigned; the second operator overwrites the first
scenario_edges.suggested_handling: optimistic lock + a 'this reservation was just updated' reconcile screen

scenario_edges.scenario: An operator overrides a blocked rate, then realizes it was the wrong reservation.
scenario_edges.trigger: an irreversible override with no undo
scenario_edges.impact: wrong rate committed; no way to roll back without a manager
scenario_edges.suggested_handling: confirm-with-reason before the override + an undo window + audit entry

scenario_edges.scenario: A duty manager approves an exception without seeing the reason the operator entered.
scenario_edges.trigger: a high-stakes approval made on incomplete information
scenario_edges.impact: unaccountable approvals the manager can't defend after the fact
scenario_edges.suggested_handling: surface the operator's reason + prior context on the approval screen; log the decision

scenario_edges.scenario: A guest asks to withdraw consent for storing their ID scan after check-in.
scenario_edges.trigger: consent withdrawal on already-stored personal data
scenario_edges.impact: non-compliant data retention if there is no withdrawal path
scenario_edges.suggested_handling: a withdraw-consent flow that purges the ID scan + confirms deletion
scenario_edges.open_question: Does local law require a specific retention/erasure window we must honor?

scenario_edges.scenario: The very first shift on a fresh property: zero reservations exist yet.
scenario_edges.trigger: empty state on the primary surface
scenario_edges.impact: a blank dashboard reads as broken; operator doesn't know the next action
scenario_edges.suggested_handling: empty state with value prop + a 'create walk-in' primary action
